report.summary: UX audited 6 new learn pages from today's build cycle, fixed critical Next.js metadata/client-component conflicts, corrected structured data schema params, created 6 branded OG SVG images, and updated all OG image references.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed critical 'use client' + export metadata conflict on crypto-leverage-trading-guide-2026 and dyor-token-research-guide-2026 — these would have caused Next.js build failures since client components cannot export metadata

Fixed incorrect generateArticleSchema parameter names: leverage-trading used 'headline' instead of 'title', DYOR used 'published'/'modified' instead of 'datePublished'/'dateModified' — structured data would have been malformed
Fixed StructuredData component prop name from 'schemas'/'schema' to 'data' on leverage-trading and DYOR pages — JSON-LD would not have rendered
Updated all OG image references from .png to .svg to match actual created assets
Verified combineSchemas usage consistency across all 6 pages — LST comparison, RWA, TON, and Sui pages were correctly implemented
Identified styling inconsistency: leverage-trading and DYOR pages use inline styles while TON, Sui, LST, RWA use Tailwind + CSS variables — flagged for future normalization sprint

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-leverage-trading.svg (1200x630) — Trading category, 2x/5x/10x multiplier visual, margin & liquidation subtitle
OG image: og-dyor-token-research.svg (1200x630) — Education category, magnifying glass + checklist motif, 10-step framework subtitle
OG image: og-lst-comparison-2026.svg (1200x630) — DeFi/Liquid Staking category, three-column protocol comparison, Solana purple theme
OG image: og-rwa-defi-yield-comparison-2026.svg (1200x630) — Yield/Comparison category, side-by-side RWA (4-8%) vs DeFi (5-30%+) bars
OG image: og-ton-defi-guide.svg (1200x630) — DeFi category, TON blue (#0088CC), Telegram integration visuals, protocol names
OG image: og-sui-defi-guide.svg (1200x630) — DeFi category, Sui blue (#4DA2FF), $2.6B TVL stat, Move language reference

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/crypto-leverage-trading-guide-2026 — 3 fixes applied (use client removal, schema params, StructuredData prop)
/learn/dyor-token-research-guide-2026 — 3 fixes applied (use client removal, schema params, StructuredData prop)
/learn/solana-lst-comparison-marinade-jito-sanctum-2026 — verified correct, no changes needed
/learn/rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison-2026 — verified correct, no changes needed
/learn/ton-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026 — verified correct, Tailwind + CSS variables pattern
/learn/sui-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026 — verified correct, Tailwind + CSS variables pattern

sections.title: Technical Debt Noted
items: 2 of 6 pages (leverage-trading, DYOR) use inline styles while 4 use Tailwind classes — recommend normalizing to Tailwind in next design cycle
Leverage-trading h1 uses fixed fontSize: 36 without responsive scaling — should use clamp() or Tailwind responsive classes
No BackToTop component rendered in TON and Sui pages despite being imported
